title: dpdk bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[24.11.2-3]
- Enable net/mlx5 driver for ARM (RHEL-109887)

[24.11.2-2]
- Avoid requiring NET_ADMIN with mlx5 (RHEL-93856)

[24.11.2-1]
- Rebase to 24.11.2 (RHEL-96849)
full_text:
[24.11.2-3]
- Enable net/mlx5 driver for ARM (RHEL-109887)

[24.11.2-2]
- Avoid requiring NET_ADMIN with mlx5 (RHEL-93856)

[24.11.2-1]
- Rebase to 24.11.2 (RHEL-96849)
